scripts.prebuild: npm run generate:icons && npm run sync:runtime-deps
scripts.release:package:mac: cross-env DOLSSH_TARGET_PLATFORM=darwin DOLSSH_TARGET_ARCH=universal electron-forge package --platform darwin --arch universal
scripts.release:package:win: cross-env DOLSSH_TARGET_PLATFORM=win32 DOLSSH_TARGET_ARCH=x64 electron-forge package --platform win32 --arch x64
scripts.release:dist:mac: npm run release:clean && npm run generate:icons && npm run release:prepare:ssh:mac && npm run sync:runtime-deps && npm run release:package:mac && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac dmg zip --universal --publish never --prepackaged out/dolssh-darwin-universal/dolssh.app
scripts.release:dist:win: npm run release:clean && npm run generate:icons && npm run release:prepare:ssh:win && npm run sync:runtime-deps && npm run release:package:win && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --win nsis --x64 --publish never --prepackaged out/dolssh-win32-x64
